description:
Implement MDI OAuth client-credentials token handling for serverless runtimes.

**Scope**
- Add `src/lib/mdi/token.ts` as the only token acquisition helper.
- Cache tokens in Lambda/container memory when available and refresh before expiry; do not require Redis.
- Use Secrets Manager for MDI client credentials.
- Handle 401 by forcing a single refresh/retry path and then failing loudly.
- Add tests for concurrent token requests within one runtime and refresh-on-401 behavior.

**Acceptance**
- First request fetches a token and subsequent same-runtime requests reuse it until near expiry.
- No Redis, ElastiCache, or shared token-cache infrastructure is required.
- Credential and token values never appear in logs.
title: MDI token client without Redis
